hero.subtitle: Book skip hire, collections, demolition and portaloo hire online in minutes. Fast, reliable and environmentally responsible waste management.

servicesSection.label: Our Services
servicesSection.title: Choose the right service for you
servicesSection.description: Transparent pricing and instant online booking for every type of waste.

whyChoose.label: Why Choose Us
whyChoose.title: Your trusted waste management partner
whyChoose.description: We make responsible waste removal effortless — for homes and businesses alike.

items.title: Licensed Waste Carrier
items.text: Fully registered with the Environment Agency for safe, legal disposal.

items.title: Fast & Reliable
items.text: Same-day and next-day collections to suit your schedule.

items.title: Transparent Pricing
items.text: Clear, upfront prices with no hidden fees — ever.

items.title: Eco Friendly
items.text: We divert 98% of collected waste away from landfill.

items.title: Secure Payments
items.text: Pay safely online with Stripe — cards, Apple Pay & Google Pay.

about.label: About Us
about.title: Committed to a cleaner, greener tomorrow
paragraphs: Waste Management Services is a fully licensed waste carrier helping thousands of residential and commercial customers dispose of waste responsibly.
From a single skip to full demolition and site clearance, we combine modern online booking with a reliable, environmentally responsible service you can trust.

areas.label: Areas We Cover
areas.title: We work across the UK
areas.description: Enter your postcode to check availability and same-day or next-day collection in your area.

finalCta.title: Need waste removed today?
finalCta.description: Book online in minutes or call our friendly team for a free, no-obligation quote.
